sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n4073" key="a)lhqeuth/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀληθ-ευτής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οῦ</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n4073.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">truth-speaking person</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἀ. λόγων</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0563.tlg001:21:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Max.Tyr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">21.6</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
